title: DonutSMP Pack
description: The BEST Modpack for playing on the Donut SMP, with fully allowed Mods, for a fair and fun experience!
body:
# 🍩 Donut SMP Pack

This modpack gives you everything you need for a perfect SMP experience - all mods are  allowed on the server.

# Features
- All mods are allowed
- Performance improvements for better gameplay
- Handy QoL mods for a better experience

<details>
<summary>Included Mods</summary>

## Performance & Optimization
- Sodium & Co. (Sodium, Sodium Extra, Reeses Sodium Options, Indium, Iris Shaders)
- Lithium
- Krypton
- Entity Culling & More Culling
- Ferrite Core
## Quality of Life & Interface
- Simple Voice Chat
- Shulker Box Tooltip
- Better Advancements
- Chat Heads
- Ukus Armor HUD
- Trigger Sit
- Debug Keybinds
- Zoomify
- Borderless Fullscreen
- Gamma Utils
- Immediate Fast
- PvP Hit Sound
## Cosmetic & Visuals
- 3D Skin Layers
- Model Gap Fix (Only in older Versions)
## Utilities
- Mod Menu
- Fast IP Ping
- Continuity

</details>



⚠️ Note:
_This modpack is not affiliated with DrDonut or the Donut SMP. It is a community-created client pack._

**Please give me your feedback [here](https://lostgpu.netlify.app/feedback).**
